active_subject.description: Which person or area to focus on: 'left', 'right', 'center', 'largest', or a brief descriptor like 'person on the left'

scene_type.description: Type of scene for framing decisions

layout.description: Spatial layout: 'single' (one subject), 'side_by_side' (two subjects apart, both matter), 'text_card' (full-width title/logo), 'slide' (presentation/graphic), or 'general'

requires_full_width.description: True if essential content spans most of the frame width (full-width text/logo, slide, wide graphic) and must NOT be cropped to a narrow vertical window

min_horizontal_coverage.description: Fraction of the frame WIDTH (0.0-1.0) that must remain visible to keep all essential content. ~0.3 for a single centered subject, ~0.5-0.6 for two people side by side, ~0.9-1.0 for full-width text/slides
